creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Jeremy Messenger (mezz7@cox.net) wrote:

> See here:  
> http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-gnome/2008-June/020390.html
> 
> I haven't check in the tarball to see if it has changed.

Having a (pretty weighty) dependency for a widely used library
because of a script is unpractical. If there are consumers of that
script (which I really doubt given that it's not even installed
with +x and no one complained) they should define USE_PYTHON as
needed instead.

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
